source_jobs.description:
<p><strong>THE POSITION<br></strong>Our roster has an opening with your name on it</p>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">The&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">Data Scienti</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">st</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">, Generosity Experimentation will play a pivotal role in&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">growing</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;an experimentation function within the Sportsbook Commercial team</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;focused on&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">retention and loyalty</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">.&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">Reporting to the Experimentation&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">Manager,&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">t</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">his role will help to&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">accelerate the&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">speed of learning&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">while&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">maintaining</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">standardization of processes across teams. The&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">Data Scientist&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">will partner with retention marketing stakeholders and will&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">be responsible for</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;designing and analyzing experiments that help to answer key questions and drive promotional strategy</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">They will have the opportunity to work cross-functionally, aligning with&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">commercial&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">stakeholders</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">,</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">generosity data science,&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">marketing&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed GrammarErrorHighlight SCXW61593549 BCX0">technology</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;and</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">machine learning</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0">&nbsp;engineering</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW61593549 BCX0&quot

notes: FanDuel has a diverse set of job postings, with a mix of technical and non-technical roles. While there are some technical roles, such as Data Engineer and Endpoint Platform Staff Engineer, the majority of postings are for non-technical roles, such as Commercial Analyst and Campaign Strategy Director.
